'Ndrina Perna.description: The 'Ndrina Perna is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Cosenza, Calabria, Italy. It emerged after the death of boss Luigi Palermo in 1977, leading to a split and a violent feud with the Pino-Sena faction that resulted in dozens of murders. The clan was involved in drug trafficking and other criminal activities, and its members were targeted in multiple police operations. The clan's power was consolidated under boss Franco Perna.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Perna is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Perna è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cosenza.

descriptions: Africano allied with the Perna faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Con i Perna si allearono anche gli Africano di Amantea e i Serpa di Paola

descriptions: The Africano allied with the Perna during the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Con i Perna si allearono anche gli Africano di Amantea

descriptions: The Cicero 'ndrina merged with the Perna and Pino-Sena.
edges.evidence_quote: A oggi i Perna dominano l'area e a queste due 'ndrine si sono uniti coloro che erano rimasti dei Perna - Cicero - Pranno e dei Pino-Sena.

descriptions: The remnants of Perna-Cicero-Pranno united with the current Perna group.
edges.evidence_quote: Attualmente i Perna dominano l'area e si sono uniti a queste due 'ndrine ciò che rimaneva dei Perna-Cicero-Pranno e dei Pino-Sena.

descriptions: The two factions fought a war after the split.
edges.evidence_quote: Scoppia subito dopo una guerra tra le due famiglie.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Perna split into two factions: Perna-Pranno-Vitelli and Pino-Sena.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la morte del capobastone Luigi Palermo ... la 'ndrina si divise in due fazioni, da un lato i Perna-Pranno-Vitelli e dall'altra i Pino-Sena.

descriptions: The remnants of Pino-Sena united with the current Perna group.
edges.evidence_quote: Attualmente i Perna dominano l'area e si sono uniti a queste due 'ndrine ciò che rimaneva dei Perna-Cicero-Pranno e dei Pino-Sena.

descriptions: Serpa allied with the Perna faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Con i Perna si allearono anche gli Africano di Amantea e i Serpa di Paola

descriptions: The Serpa allied with the Perna during the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: e i Serpa di Paola

descriptions: The Vitelli were part of the Perna faction.
edges.evidence_quote: da un lato i Perna-Pranno-Vitelli

descriptions: The Pranno were part of the Perna faction.
edges.evidence_quote: da un lato i Perna-Pranno-Vitelli

descriptions: Pino-Sena and Perna-Pranno-Vitelli were in conflict in the Guerra di Cosenza.
edges.evidence_quote: Guerra di Cosenza : scontro di grandi dimensioni e di lunga durata che vide protagoniste molte cosche della provincia di Cosenza , tra cui i Pino-Sena e i Perna-Pranno-Vitelli.

descriptions: Pino-Sena and Perna-Pranno-Vitelli were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine degli anni Settanta si schierarono con i Pino-Sena in faida con i Perna-Pranno-Vitelli.

descriptions: A faida (conflict) broke out between the Pino and Perna factions.
edges.evidence_quote: Scoppia subito dopo una faida tra le due famiglie.

descriptions: After the faida of the 1980s, the Pino merged into the Perna.
edges.evidence_quote: dopo la faida degli anni ottanta sono confluiti nella 'ndrina dei Perna

descriptions: The Sena were part of the Pino-Sena faction in conflict with the Perna.
edges.evidence_quote: Scoppia subito dopo una faida tra le due famiglie.

descriptions: After the faida of the 1980s, the Sena merged into the Perna.
edges.evidence_quote: dopo la faida degli anni ottanta sono confluiti nella 'ndrina dei Perna

descriptions: Keiji Union split from Tankai-ikka.

descriptions: The Santa Maria di Gesù Mafia family is listed as an ally in the infobox.

'Ndrina Forastefano.description: The 'Ndrina Forastefano is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, Italy, operating in the Sibaritide area. It is involved in extortion, usury, vote-buying, drug trafficking, fraud, human trafficking, and infiltration of public contracts and local economic sectors. The group emerged from a split with the Abbruzzese clan and was victorious in a late 1990s-2003 feud against the Zingari of Lauropoli, gaining control over criminal activities in the upper Ionian Cosentino.

descriptions: The Abbruzzese and Forastefano were targeted together in operation Kossa, indicating a cooperative or structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: 16 febbraio 2021: operazione Kossa contro i Forastefano e gli Abbruzzese.

descriptions: Faillace fought alongside Forastefano in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Forastefano e i Portoraro

descriptions: Forastefano is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Forastefano è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Forastefano and Abbruzzese were originally a single 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: In origine era un'unica 'ndrina insieme agli Abbruzzese

descriptions: Faillace-Portoraro is a family affiliated with Forastefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Federico Faillace a Spezzano Albanese, presunto affiliato ai Forastefano, nonché capo dei Faillace-Portoraro

descriptions: Forastefano was in a feud against the Zingari di Lauropoli.
edges.evidence_quote: È stata coinvolta alla fine degli anni novanta e all'inizio del nuovo secolo nella faida contro gli Zingari di Lauropoli

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel (via Gente Nueva) had a dispute with Beltrán Leyva Organization.

Los Tiguerones.description: Ecuadorian narcoterrorist and criminal organization specializing in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. It split from Los Choneros in 2021 after the assassination of Los Choneros leader Jorge Luís Zambrano. Originating in Esmeraldas, it expanded to Guayaquil and Manta. The group gained notoriety for a violent takeover of TC Televisión in 2024.

descriptions: Los Chone Killers list Los Tiguerones as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Tiguerones, Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Choneros have Los Tiguerones as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Lagartos, Los Lobos, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers

descriptions: Los Tiguerones are enemies of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Tiguerones

descriptions: Los Lobos consider Los Tiguerones as enemies.

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Tiguerones broke away from Los Choneros together.
edges.evidence_quote: broke away in 2020 after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano, along with Los Chone Killers and Los Tiguerones

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Tiguerones cooperated in a wave of violence.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos, along with their ally Los Tiguerones, were behind a wave of violence across Ecuador

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Tiguerones united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria, se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

edges.evidence_quote: Em Novembro de 2022, Los Lobos, juntamente com o seu aliado Los Tiguerones, estiveram por trás de uma onda de violência em todo o Equador

edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de ... Los Tiguerones ... que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria

descriptions: Los Tiguerones are allied with Los del norte.

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Lobos are allies in the Nueva Generación alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2021, Los Tiguerones, along with other gangs formerly allied to Los Choneros, including Los Chone Killers, Los Pipos, and Los Lobos, announced the creation of an alliance dubbed Nueva Generación after an alliance with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

descriptions: Los Tiguerones attacked inmates alongside Los Lobos during a prison riot against Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: On 28 September 2021, a dispute between Los Lobos and Los Choneros in the Litoral Penitentiary, Guayaquil, led to a riot that killed 123 inmates... In that riot, members of the Los Tiguerones gang attacked inmates in pavilions 1 and 3 and beheaded five of them.

descriptions: Comando Vermelho (Falange Vermelha) and Falange Jacaré were at war.
edges.evidence_quote: duas facções criminosas guerreavam entre si no estado do Rio de Janeiro; Falange Vermelha e Falange Jacaré.

descriptions: Terceiro Comando may have originated as a dissident group from Falange Jacaré.
edges.evidence_quote: pode ter sido criado de uma dissidência de uma das falanges que controlavam a prisão de Ilha Grande, provavelmente a Falange Jacaré

descriptions: Al-Qaeda was built upon the networks of Maktab Al-Khidamat.
edges.evidence_quote: Building upon the networks of Maktab Al-Khidamat, the founding members decided to create the organization to serve as a 'vanguard' for jihad.

White Hand Gang.description: The White Hand Gang was a collection of Irish American gangs on the New York City, Brooklyn, and Red Hook waterfronts from the early 1900s to 1925. They organized against the growing influence of Italian gangsters, choosing their name as a response to the Sicilian Black Hand gangs. Known for being virulently anti-Italian and particularly violent, the gang suffered from unstable leadership and internal killings, leading to its demise.

descriptions: Frankie Yale's Mafia family waged war with the White Hand Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In New York City, Frankie Yale waged war with the Irish-American White Hand Gang.

descriptions: Frankie Yale of the American Mafia fought with the White Hand Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: En Nueva York, Frankie Yale combatió con los irlandeses estadounidense de la White Hand Gang .

descriptions: Listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: White Hand Gang

descriptions: Swamp Angels merged with rival waterfront gangs into the White Hand Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: until eventually they merged with the rival waterfront gangs into the White Hand Gang at the end of the 19th century.

descriptions: The White Hand Gang formed to counter the Morello crime family's encroachment on the waterfront.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1900s, with Italian criminal organizations such as the Morello crime family encroaching on the waterfront, various Irish gangs united to form the White Hand Gang.

descriptions: The Mercante faction fought a war with the Telegrafo clan, resulting in the killing of Amleto Mercante.
edges.evidence_quote: Un'altra guerra in cui il clan è stato coinvolto, ma questa volta guidata dai Mercante, fu contro il clan Telegrafo. Nel 2005, infatti, Amleto Mercante, il fratello del boss Giuseppe , fu ucciso dal clan Telegrafo.

Kyushu Seido-kai.description: The Kyushu Seido-kai was a yakuza organization based in Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan, formed in 2006 as a splinter group from the Dojin-kai. It engaged in armed conflicts with its former parent syndicate, using automatic firearms and grenades, and was designated as a yakuza group in 2008. The group was involved in drug trafficking and loansharking, and dissolved in June 2013, later reorganizing under new names.

descriptions: Dojin-kai has been in a violent conflict with its splinter group Kyushu Seido-kai since 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dojin-kai again started a blatantly vicious conflict with its splinter group, Kyushu Seido-kai, in 2006.

descriptions: Dojin-kai considers Namikawa-kai a rival as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: The Namikawa-kai and the Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai is a splinter group of Dojin-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dojin-kai again started a blatantly vicious conflict with its splinter group, Kyushu Seido-kai, in 2006.

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai engaged in armed conflicts with its former parent syndicate Dojin-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Since its formation, the Kyushu Seido-kai has been known for its blatant armed conflicts with its former parent syndicate, the Dojin-kai

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai ended its gang war with Dojin-kai and dissolved.
edges.evidence_quote: On June 11, 2013, Kyushu Seido-kai announced the end of its gang war with Dojin-kai as well as its dissolution.

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai aligned with Yamaguchi-gumi during the conflict with Dojin-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: They allegedly aligned themselves with the Yamaguchi-gumi, the Dojin-kai's rival and the largest yakuza syndicate in Japan.

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai's president maintained a close relationship with the president of Yamaken-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: The second president Namikawa has allegedly maintained a close relationship with Kunio Inoue. Inoue is the president of the fourth-generation Yamaken-gumi

Bamboo Union.description: The Bamboo Union is the largest of Taiwan's three main criminal Triads, with roughly 20,000 members. Formed in 1957 by waishengren children in Taipei, it evolved from street-fighting to profiteering, engaging in protection, extortion, drug trafficking, and contract killings. The gang has historic ties to the Kuomintang and operates transnationally, with a presence in the United States, China, and other countries.

descriptions: Bamboo Union cooperated with Iron Blood Patriots for overseas missions and heroin trade.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1980s, the gang became even more powerful when they joined hands with the "Iron Blood Patriots" to carry out missions overseas.

descriptions: Bamboo Union partners with Sam Gor Syndicate for drug trafficking and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bamboo Union is understood to partner with the Japanese yakuza and multi-ethnic triads like Sam Gor syndicate, and the leaders of these groups including Tse Chi Lop, both for drug trafficking and money laundering.

descriptions: Bamboo Union partners with Yakuza for drug trafficking and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bamboo Union is understood to partner with the Japanese yakuza and multi-ethnic triads like Sam Gor syndicate, and the leaders of these groups including Tse Chi Lop, both for drug trafficking and money laundering.

descriptions: Bamboo Union is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Infobox lists Bamboo Union as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Asian Boyz, Bamboo Union, Black Dragons, Chung Ching Yee, Wo Hop To

descriptions: The Avenues clashed with Toonerville.
edges.evidence_quote: The Avenues also began to clash with neighboring gangs, such as Highland Park 13, Cypress Park Boys, Toonerville , Frog Town Rifa and Thee Rascals, in an attempt to assert their dominance.

descriptions: Vastarella clan is listed as an ally of Lo Russo clan in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Scissionisti di Secondigliano, Vastarella clan, Piccirillo clan, and formerly Secondigliano Alliance

descriptions: Barrio Azteca is a rival of Border Brothers.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Mexicles , Sinaloa Cartel , Border Brothers

descriptions: Border Brothers are listed as rivals of Norteños in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Fresno Bulldogs, Sureños, MS-13, Mexican Mafia, Aryan Brotherhood, 18th Street gang, White Fence, Border Brothers, Tiny Rascal Gang, Oriental Troopz, Mongols MC
